---
pagetitle: "About"
page-layout: full
---

# About

In progress....

# Meet the Team

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}

![](../images/lewis-jones.png){.img-fluid}

**Lewis A. Jones**  
University College London

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

![](../images/kenneth-johnson.png){.img-fluid}

**Kenneth Johnson**  
Natural History Museum, UK

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}

![](../images/florence-okoye.png){.img-fluid}

**Florence Okoye**  
Natural History Museum, UK

:::

:::

# Contact Us

Reach out if you have any questions, would like more information, or would like to contribute to Reef Archive.

Email: [info@reefarchive.org](mailto:info@reefarchive.org)
